title: Prosaptia deltoideophylla
taxonomy: Prosaptia deltoideophylla is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Australia and is a part of the genus Prosaptia. The classification of Prosaptia deltoideophylla is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the division Pteridophyta, and then the class Polypodiopsida. The order of classification is then Polypodiales, followed by the family Polypodiaceae, and finally the genus Prosaptia. This classification shows the intricate hierarchy of the plant's relationships within the plant kingdom.
